prompt: Create a custom accounting dimension "Produktlinje" with the values "Standard" and "Basis". Then post a voucher on account 7140 for 8900 NOK, linked to the dimension value "Basis".

body.prompt: Create a custom accounting dimension "Produktlinje" with the values "Standard" and "Basis". Then post a voucher on account 7140 for 8900 NOK, linked to the dimension value "Basis".
